mapper.select: /* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf001 */ SELECT NVL(SUB.CONTRACT_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.CUSTOMER_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.SUB_STATUS, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.MODEL_NAME, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.MODEL_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.NCN, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.NCN_GRADE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.IMSI, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.ICC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.G3_IND, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.DEALER_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.LST_DEV_CHG_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.ITNET_BAL_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.SLS_CMPN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.INTM_SRL_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.WIBRO_IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.WIBRO_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.USIM_FXD_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.CNTR_USE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.REAL_USE_CUST_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.SRL_IF_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.UNPD_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.MNP_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.INDV_ENTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.INDV_ENTR_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.EVNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.EVNT_TRTM_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.SCAN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.ON_OFF_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.DOBYYYYMMDD, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.BAN, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.WIFI_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.PPPO, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB.PROD_TYPE, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB WHERE 1 = 1 AND SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND TO_CHAR(SUB.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM')

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf002 */ SELECT NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(CUSTOMER_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_NAME, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(NCN, '') || '|' || NVL(NCN_GRADE, '') || '|' || NVL(IMSI, '') || '|' || NVL(ICC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(G3_IND, '') || '|' || NVL(DEALER_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_DEV_CHG_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(ITNET_BAL_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SLS_CMPN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(INTM_SRL_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(USIM_FXD_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_USE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SVC_CNTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(REAL_USE_CUST_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(SRL_IF_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(UNPD_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(MNP_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(INDV_ENTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(INDV_ENTR_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(SOC, '') || '|' || NVL(ON_OFF_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(DOBYYYYMMDD, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_CHANGE_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(WIFI_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(BAN, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_AGNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PPPO, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE 1=1 AND EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000' AND EVNT_TRTM_DT < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf003 */ SELECT NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(SOC, '') || '|' || NVL(APP_END_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(FEATURE_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(SERVICE_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(EFFECTIVE_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(EXPIRATION_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(SOC_CCR_DISPLAY_IND, '') || '|' || NVL(INBH_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(DEALER_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APP_START_DD, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000' AND EVNT_TRTM_DT < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf004 */ SELECT NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(APP_END_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(DEALER_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(INTM_SRL_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_STR, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000' AND EVNT_TRTM_DT < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf005 */ SELECT NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(SALORG_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_SHOP_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(TRRM_SHOP_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTPNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SLS_PRSN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(TRTM_PRSN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(ENCR_PRSN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SLS_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(DVC_OFW_AMNT, '') || '|' || NVL(INST_ORGIN_AMNT, '') || '|' || NVL(INST_MNTH_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APP_START_DD, '') || '|' || NVL(APP_END_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_NAME, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(ENGG_MNTH_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(SVC_CNTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_CHN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(BL_DC_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SIM_START_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(SIM_END_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(SIM_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(REG_DTTM, '') || '|' || NVL(SBSCST_IMPS_EXMP_AMNT, '') || '|' || NVL(AGNC_SUPOT_DSCN_AMNT, '') || '|' || NVL(USIM_AMNT, '') || '|' || NVL(KD_SUPOT_DSCN_AMNT, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000' AND EVNT_TRTM_DT < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf006 */ SELECT NVL(RATE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_END_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_STRT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_GRP_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PAY_CL_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(DATA_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(BASE_AMT, '') || '|' || NVL(FREE_CALL_CL_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(FREE_CALL_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(NW_IN_CALL_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(NW_OUT_CALL_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(FREE_SMS_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(FREE_DATA_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(ONLINE_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(AL_FLAG, '') || '|' || NVL(SERVICE_TYPE, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_RATE_MST

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf007 */ SELECT NVL(RATE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(AGRM_TRM, '') || '|' || NVL(DC_AMT, '') || '|' || NVL(SPRT_TP, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_END_DTTM, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_STRT_DTTM, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_RATE_SPEC

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf008 */ SELECT NVL(ORGN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(KT_ORG_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(HGHR_ORGN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_STAT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_GRD, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD1, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD2, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD3, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_LVL_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_STRT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_STRT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_CMPLT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(TAXBILL_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(CMSN_PRVD_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(HNDST_INVTR_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(CLOSE_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(LOGIS_CNTER_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(HNDST_ORD_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_REG_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(CORP_REG_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_CAT, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_CON, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_MBLPHN, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_EMAIL, '') || '|' || NVL(TMNT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(SPECIAL_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(USE_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(OLD_KT_ORG_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(OLD_ORGN_ID, '') AS STR_VAL FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE 1=1 AND TYPE_CD = '20' /* 대리점 */ AND TYPE_DTL_CD1 = 'CS' /* 위탁대리점 */

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf009 */ SELECT NVL(PRDT_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(RPRS_PRDT_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(RPRS_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_COLR_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(MNFCT_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_LNCH_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(PRDT_DT, '') AS STR_VAL FROM CMN_INTM_MDL

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf010 */ SELECT NVL(RPRS_PRDT_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(OLD_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM, '') || '|' || NVL(UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM, '') || '|' || NVL(OUT_UNIT_PRIC, '') || '|' || NVL(MNFCT_GRANT, '') || '|' || NVL(REMRK, '') AS STR_VAL FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf011 */ SELECT NVL(SUB.CONTRACT_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(CUSTOMER_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_NAME, '') || '|' || NVL(MODEL_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(NCN, '') || '|' || NVL(NCN_GRADE, '') || '|' || NVL(IMSI, '') || '|' || NVL(ICC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(G3_IND, '') || '|' || NVL(DEALER_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_DEV_CHG_DATE, '') || '|' || NVL(ITNET_BAL_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(SUB_STATUS_LAST_ACTV_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SLS_CMPN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(INTM_SRL_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_IMEI, '') || '|' || NVL(WIBRO_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(USIM_FXD_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_USE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(SVC_CNTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(REAL_USE_CUST_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(SRL_IF_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(UNPD_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(MNP_IND_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(INDV_ENTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(INDV_ENTR_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(EVNT_TRTM_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(ON_OFF_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(DOBYYYYMMDD, '') || '|' || NVL(BAN, '') || '|' || NVL(WIFI_MAC_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_AGNT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(PPPO, '') AS STR_VAL FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB WHERE 1 = 1 AND SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB.EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf012 */ SELECT NVL(MCLUB_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(HNDST_ORD_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(CLOSE_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(LOGIS_CNTER_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_REG_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(CORP_REG_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_CAT, '') || '|' || NVL(BIZ_CON, '') || '|' || NVL(RPRSEN_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(RPRSEN_RRNUM, '') || '|' || NVL(TELNUM, '') || '|' || NVL(FAX, '') || '|' || NVL(EMAIL, '') || '|' || NVL(ZIPCD, '') || '|' || NVL(ADDR1, '') || '|' || NVL(ADDR2, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_MBLPHN, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_EMAIL, '') || '|' || NVL(RESPN_PRSN_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(TMNT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(TO_CHAR(REG_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') || '|' || NVL(TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') || '|' || NVL(HST_SEQ, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(HGHR_ORGN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(KT_ORG_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_STAT_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_GRD, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(ORGN_LVL_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD1, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD2, '') || '|' || NVL(TYPE_DTL_CD3, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_STRT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_CMPLT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_STRT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(TAXBILL_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(CMSN_PRVD_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(HNDST_INVTR_YN, '') AS STR_VAL FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_HST WHERE 1=1 AND TYPE_CD = '20' /* 대리점 */ AND TYPE_DTL_CD1 = 'CS' /* 위탁대리점 */

/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf013 */ SELECT NVL(A.PLCY_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(A.SLS_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(A.SLS_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(A.PLCY_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(B.DC_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(E.CD_DSC, '') || '|' || NVL(C.ENGG_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(D.INST_CNT, '') FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_MST A, MSP_KT_PLCY_DISCOUNT B, MSP_KT_PLCY_ENGG C, MSP_KT_PLCY_INST D, CMN_GRP_CD_MST E WHERE A.PLCY_ID = B.PLCY_ID AND A.SLS_NO = B.SLS_NO AND A.PLCY_ID = C.PLCY_ID AND A.SLS_NO = C.SLS_NO AND A.PLCY_ID = D.PLCY_ID AND A.SLS_NO = D.SLS_NO AND B.DC_TYPE = E.CD_VAL AND E.GRP_ID = 'CMN0074' ORDER BY A.SLS_NO, A.SLS_NM, A.PLCY_TYPE, A.PPPO, B.DC_TYPE, C.ENGG_CNT, D.INST_CNT
/* FdhTransmitMapper.getFdhInf014 */ SELECT NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(CAN_DATE, '') FROM CLS_CAN_DATA WHERE CAN_DATE >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000'

/* FdhTransmitMapper".getFdhArpuSttc */ SELECT NVL(USG_YM, '') || '|' || NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(SVC_CNTR_NO, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_END_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(APPL_STRT_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_OPEN_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_ORD, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_CHNG_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_STATUS, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_STATUS_DT, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_STATUS_RSN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_STATUS_RSN_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_GENDER, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_AGE, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_BUY_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_ON_OFF_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_MOVE_COMPANY, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_MOVE_COMPANY_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(CUS_AHRT_TMNT_TRGT_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_ORGN_AGNCY_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_ORGN_AGNCY_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_AGRM_MNTH_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_INST_AMNT, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_SALE_PLCY_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_SALE_PLCY_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_CAN_RSN_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_CAN_RSN_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(CNTR_DC_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(FST_RPRS_PRDT_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(FST_RPRS_PRDT_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(FST_PRDT_SRL_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_RPRS_PRDT_ID, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_RPRS_PRDT_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(LST_PRDT_SRL_NUM, '') || '|' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(ACT_PNT, 'FM990D999'),'.') || '|' || NVL(RATE_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_DATA_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_TYPE_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_DEV_TYPE_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_DEV_TYPE_NM, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_ORD, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_CHNG_YN, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_USG_DAY, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_SUS_DAY, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_CN_USG_DAY, '') || '|' || NVL(RATE_SCN_USG_DAY, '') || '|' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(RATE_ACT_PNT, 'FM990D999'),'.') AS ARPU FROM MSP_ARPU_STTC_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND USG_YM = #{usgYm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT NVL(TO_CHAR(CALL_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') || '|' || NVL(PREFIX, '') || '|' || NVL(TELCO_PX, '') || '|' || NVL(CALL_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(CALL_TIME, '') || '|' || NVL(CALL_AMOUNT, '') || '|' || NVL(SMS_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(SMS_AMOUNT, '') FROM PPS_STATS_KJ_CALL WHERE TO_CHAR(CALL_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND TO_CHAR(CALL_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '31'

SELECT NVL(TO_CHAR(CALL_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') || '|' || NVL(DAY_MINUS_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(DAY_MINUS_AMOUNT, '') || '|' || NVL(IN_CALL_DURATION, '') || '|' || NVL(IN_CALL_AMOUNT, '') || '|' || NVL(OUT_CALL_DURATION, '') || '|' || NVL(OUT_CALL_AMOUNT, '') || '|' || NVL(IN_DATA_PKT_DURATION, '') || '|' || NVL(IN_DATA_PKT_AMOUNT, '') || '|' || NVL(IN_SMS_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(IN_SMS_AMOUNT, '') || '|' || NVL(OUT_SMS_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(OUT_SMS_AMOUNT, '') || '|' || NVL(ETC_CNT, '') || '|' || NVL(ETC_AMOUNT, '') || '|' || NVL(CHARGE, '') FROM PPS_STATS_CALL WHERE TO_CHAR(CALL_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01' AND TO_CHAR(CALL_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') || '31'

SELECT NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, '') || '|' || NVL(SOC, '') || '|' || NVL(SERVICE_TYPE, '') || '|' || NVL(TO_CHAR(ENTER_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') || '|' || NVL(TO_CHAR(STATUS_STOP_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') || '|' || NVL(STATUS_STOP_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(TO_CHAR(STATUS_CANCEL_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') || '|' || NVL(STATUS_CANCEL_CD, '') || '|' || NVL(BASIC_REMAINS, '') || '|' || NVL(TO_CHAR(BASIC_EXPIRE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') || '|' || NVL(TO_CHAR(BASIC_EMPT_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') || '|' || NVL(VOICE_RATE, '') || '|' || NVL(DATA_REG, '') || '|' || NVL(TO_CHAR(DATA_REG_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') || '|' || NVL(DATA_MODE, '') || '|' || NVL(DATA_SERVICE_CODE, '') || '|' || NVL(DATA_QUOTA, '') || '|' || NVL(DATA_QUOTA_REMAINS, '') || '|' || NVL(DATA_VA_REMAINS, '') || '|' || NVL(TO_CHAR(DATA_EXPIRE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), '') || '|' || NVL(DATA_LIMIT, '') || '|' || NVL(LAST_KT_IN_MODE, '') || '|' || NVL(TO_CHAR(LAST_KT_SYN_DT,
